headline: ResMed (RMD) Stock Valuation Check After Mixed Returns And Undervaluation Signals
summary: Recent performance snapshot ResMed (RMD) has drawn investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock up about 1% over the past day but down over the past week, month, past 3 months and year. That backdrop makes the current fundamentals worth a closer look, including revenue of US$5.54b, net income of US$1.52b and a market value around US$28.13b, alongside a mid range value score of 5.
